hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
restaurant_type_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity) in ['breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner']: restaurant_type_set.add(restaurant_type(activity, target_city(plan)))
result=({"Hunan cuisine", "Snacks", "Cantonese cuisine"}<=restaurant_type_set)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
intercity_transport_go=''
intercity_transport_back=''
if allactivities(plan)[0]['type'] == "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[0])==start_city(plan) and allactivities(plan)[-1]['type'] == "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[-1])==target_city(plan):
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are 3 people traveling from Wuhan to Shenzhen for 3 days, and we need to satisfy at least one of the following: 1. We want to try the following types of restaurants: Hunan cuisine, Snacks, and Cantonese cuisine. 2. We want to take the train to the destination and return by train.
